title: mnesithea rottboellioides
intro: Mnesithea rottboellioides is a species of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues and fever due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Mnesithea rottboellioides include its ability to relieve symptoms of bronchitis, asthma, and other respiratory conditions, as well as its antipyretic properties which help in reducing fever. In traditional medicine, Mnesithea rottboellioides is often prepared into teas, infusions, and tinctures to utilize its medicinal properties.
